data.title: Illinois Mutual adds SIDI for working spouses, allowing agents to offer income protection. Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Illinois Mutual Life Insurance Company, based in Peoria, has recently introduced Simplified Issue Disability Income Insurance (SIDI) for working spouses of worksite benefit participants. This initiative enables independent insurance agents to offer essential income protection to their clients. The new offering is aimed at providing financial security to a broader demographic and expanding coverage options. This move by the company is part of their ongoing efforts to enhance their product portfolio and cater to the increasing demand for disability income insurance. The introduction of SIDI for working spouses complements the existing range of products and services provided by Illinois Mutual Life Insurance Company, thereby contributing to a more comprehensive and inclusive insurance solution.

data.title: California Community Foundation is offering new grants to support wildfire survivors through community gatherings, events, and workshops for rebuilding connections after Eaton and Palisades fires. (Words: 26)
data.description: Los Angeles, on December 4, 2025 - Grants are being allocated to support community gatherings, local music and storytelling events, and creative workshops. These initiatives aim to provide culturally affirming opportunities to foster connection. The funding comes as the one-year anniversary of the Eaton and Palisades fires approaches.

data.title: Global demand for bio-fermented hyaluronic acid set to triple by 2035 due to clean-label trend in skincare.
data.description: A research study titled "Bio-Fermented Hyaluronic Acid Market Forecast" reveals that the demand for bio-fermented hyaluronic acid (BFHA) is increasing due to the global trend towards clean-label, sustainable, and high-performance skincare ingredients. The study highlights the accelerated growth in the market, with significant numbers showing a rise in adoption of BFHA for skincare products. This shift indicates a growing preference for natural and effective skincare solutions, with BFHA being recognized for its benefits in the beauty industry.

data.title: Investors in Firefly Aerospace facing losses urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP before deadline. Contact James Wilson for support.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses in Firefly Aerospace to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If individuals bought or obtained Firefly common stock linked to the Offering, they are advised to get in touch with Wilson.

data.title: Government AI predictions for 2026 are uncertain, challenging even experts. Year 2025 saw disruptions in tech and government.
data.description: In 2025, SAS public sector experts from Cary, N.C. faced a turbulent year marked by significant changes in technology and government. The unpredictable landscape saw disruptions and upheavals in both sectors, putting their expertise to the test. The future appeared uncertain as these experts navigated through the challenges posed by advancements in artificial intelligence and evolving governmental policies. This year proved to be a wild ride, with unforeseen twists and turns that pushed the experts to their limits. The events of 2025 would have undoubtedly challenged even the most skilled predictors, creating an environment that demanded flexibility, adaptability, and innovation from SAS public sector professionals.

data.title: U.S. healthcare revenue cycle faces multi-billion dollar inefficiency, MedEvolve CEO suggests generative AI to reduce waste, improve patient access.
data.description: The healthcare revenue cycle in the United States is facing a significant issue worth billions of dollars due to inefficiencies. According to MedEvolve CEO Matt Seefeld, implementing generative AI along with enhancing human accountability can help address this challenge. By doing so, administrative waste can be minimized, aiming to achieve "zero touch" claims processing. Ultimately, this approach could enhance patient access to care throughout the healthcare system.

data.title: Circle releases guide transitioning to native USDC on Starknet, offers tips for devs. Learn more now!
data.description: Circle has released a detailed guide on transitioning from bridged USDC to native USDC on Starknet to assist developers. The guide covers variances, advantages, and recommended approaches for migrating. This informative resource aims to aid developers in understanding the process of moving from bridged USDC to native USDC on Starknet efficiently.

data.description: More than 1,000 job opportunities are set to be created in New York as Fluidstack, a prominent AI cloud platform used by leading laboratories globally, disclosed plans to expand its operations in the U.S. by opening a new headquarters in New York City. data.title: Pellera Technologies named official partner of NY Rangers, presenting partner of Rangers Centennial Exhibit in new partnership with MSGS.
data.description: Today, Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. (NYSE: MSGS) disclosed a partnership with Pellera Technologies, making them the Presenting Partner of the Rangers Centennial Exhibit. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both parties as they join forces to enhance the exhibit's offerings. Pellera Technologies, a top Enterprise IT Solutions provider, will play a key role in shaping the exhibit's experience. The partnership underscores a commitment to innovation and advancement within the sports and technology sectors. This venture is expected to bring unique value to the exhibit and create new opportunities for engagement with the audience.

data.title: GA Telesis signs 5-year deal with major U.S. carrier for landing gear overhaul, including Airbus fleet.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 4, 2025, GA Telesis, LLC ("GAT"), a prominent player in integrated aviation services, has inked a substantial five-year deal for landing gear overhauls with a leading U.S. airline. This agreement encompasses maintenance services for both Airbus and [insert aircraft type] fleets operated by the airline. The deal signifies a significant partnership for GAT and is expected to bring in substantial revenue over the next five years.

data.title: JAGGAER releases 25.3 product, speeds up sourcing cycles, strengthens supplier risk controls for manufacturing, public sector, higher education.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, JAGGAER unveiled its latest product release, version 25.3, designed to enhance sourcing productivity, supplier risk management, and user experience for industries such as manufacturing, public sector, and higher education. The update aims to address the challenges faced by procurement teams in reducing cycle time and controlling supplier risk while accommodating a growing user base without increasing staff count. data.title: Investors of CarMax between June 20, 2025 and September 24, 2025 are urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in CarMax to reach out to him directly. If you incurred losses in CarMax during the period from June 20, 2025, to September 24, 2025, and are interested in exploring your legal options, Wilson is available for consultation.

data.title: Investor alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Wildermuth Fund investors between Nov 1, 2020 and Jun 29, 2023. Contact James Wilson for more info.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in the Wildermuth Fund to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained shares in The Wildermuth Fund during the period from November 1, 2020, to June 29, 2023, and experienced financial losses, Wilson is available to discuss potential options. Investors are encouraged to take prompt action and contact Wilson directly to explore their legal recourse in this matter.

data.title: Diebold Nixdorf named one of America's most responsible companies by Newsweek for commitment to ESG initiatives.
data.description: Diebold Nixdorf, a global leader in revolutionizing banking and retail experiences, has proudly announced its recognition for its dedication to Environmental, Social, and Corporate Governance efforts. The company, based in North Canton, Ohio, revealed this achievement on December 4, 2025. Listed on the NYSE as DBD, Diebold Nixdorf's commitment to these initiatives has been acknowledged through this prestigious recognition. This acknowledgment signifies the importance the company places on sustainability and ethical business practices as it continues to make strides in enhancing the way individuals bank and shop worldwide.
